chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI I.A. No.159 of 2017 [Prof. Col. (R) Muhammad Wali Khan (Durrani) v. Institute of Business Administration] Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.3708/2018 2. For hearing of CMA No.5190/2011 3. For hearing of CMA No.3506/2012 4. For regular hearing 16.5.2024 The Appellant, appearing in person, was called absent on 28.8.2023 and 02.4.2024 followed by today’s absence and there is no intimation either. This Appeal is pending since 2017. Dismissed for non-prosecution along with all pending applications, if any. JUDGE JUDGE Shakeel, PS.
